goal_text:
You are looking for the 'Addenbrookes Hospital'. The hospital should have the 'children's oncology and haematology' department.
Make sure you get 'phone number'.Remember. You don't want booking for hospital. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for the Addenbrookes Hospital. The hospital should have the children's oncology and haematology department
Make sure you get phone number
